category_sources: Official GitHub README: describes termscp as a terminal file transfer/explorer with SCP, SFTP, FTP, Kube, S3, SMB, and WebDAV support.
source_facts.description: feature-rich terminal file transfer and explorer.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links to the termscp website user manual.
Official repository contains docs/man.md as the GitHub-hosted user manual.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/veeso/termscp; per instruction, repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README lists supported protocols including SCP, SFTP, FTP, Kube, S3, SMB, and WebDAV.
source_facts.description identifies terminal file transfer/explorer functionality.
